title: Employment Offer Letter
description: A conditional offer letter for a new employee.

sections.heading: Offer
sections.body: {{company_name}} is pleased to offer {{candidate_name}} the position of {{position_title}}, reporting to {{manager_name}}.

sections.heading: Start Date and Location
sections.body: Your anticipated start date is {{start_date}}. Your primary work location will be {{work_location}}.

sections.heading: Compensation
sections.body: Your base salary will be {{base_salary}}, subject to applicable withholdings and deductions.

sections.heading: Employment Type
sections.body: This is a {{employment_type}} position. Employment is subject to company policies as amended from time to time.

sections.heading: Conditions
sections.body: This offer may be conditioned on verification of work authorization, satisfactory background checks where permitted, and completion of required onboarding documentation.

sections.heading: At-Will Statement
sections.body: Where permitted by applicable law, employment is at will and either you or the company may end the employment relationship at any time, with or without cause or notice.

sections.heading: Acceptance
sections.body: To accept this offer, please sign and return this letter by {{acceptance_deadline}}.

review_notes: Remove or revise at-will language where it is not legally appropriate.
Add benefits, equity, bonus, restrictive covenant, or immigration language when relevant.
Confirm wage notice and local employment law requirements.
